jobs.title: Lead DevOps Engineer
jobs.description:
JD - DevOps Lead / Sr Lead 

About Us: 
Paytm is India's leading mobile payments and financial services distribution company. Pioneer of the mobile QR payments revolution in India, Paytm builds technologies that help small businesses with payments and commerce. Paytm’s mission is to serve half a billion Indians and bring them to the mainstream economy with the help of technology and innovation. About the Role: 
As a DevOps Lead, you will own the DevOps platform, infrastructure strategy, and operational excellence across systems. You will drive architecture decisions, standardize best practices, and lead initiatives across scalability, observability, cost optimization, and automation. This role requires a strong blend of technical depth, system design thinking, and leadership, enabling teams to deliver software efficiently and reliably at scale. 

What You Will Do: 
● Define and evolve the DevOps platform architecture to support scalable and reliable systems 
● Design and standardize CI/CD and GitOps workflows for consistent and efficient deployments 
● Drive adoption of progressive deployment strategies (canary, rollouts, etc.) to minimize risk 
● Own container orchestration platforms (Kubernetes/EKS/etc) and ensure production readiness 
● Establish and enhance observability practices for improved system visibility and faster debugging 
● Lead cloud cost optimization initiatives, ensuring efficient resource utilization 
● Build and promote an automation-first approach across infrastructure and deployment workflows
● Define and enforce DevOps governance, security, and operational standards 
● Own incident management and reliability improvements, including root cause analysis 
● Collaborate with engineering and leadership teams to align DevOps with business and scaling needs
 ● Mentor engineers and contribute to technical decision-making and design reviews 

AI & Automation Mindset: 
● Leverage AI tools to enhance productivity and reduce manual effort 
● Identify opportunities for intelligent automation and workflow optimization 
● Drive adoption of AI-assisted practices in DevOps operations

 Required Skills: 
● 6–10+ years of experience in DevOps/SRE roles 
● Strong experience with Kubernetes-based systems (EKS preferred) 
● Good understanding of AWS networking fundamentals (VPC, subnets, routing, security groups, load balancing) 
● Experience with containerized workloads across EKS and EC2-based environments 
● Hands-on experience with Terraform (or equivalent IaC tools) 
● Strong experience with CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, etc.) 
● Experience with GitOps workflows (ArgoCD preferred) 
● Experience with observability tools (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki or equivalent) 
● Experience managing production systems (Kafka, Redis, etc.) 
● Proven ability to drive cloud cost optimization initiatives 
● Strong system design and problem-solving skills

Good to Have: 
● Experience with Argo Rollouts or similar progressive delivery tools 
● Exposure to service mesh (Istio or similar) 
● Experience with multi-cluster or multi-region setups 
● Experience building internal DevOps tools or platforms 
● Familiarity with AI-driven automation workflows 
● Experience with configuration management tools (Ansible) 

What Makes You a Strong Fit: 
● Strong ownership mindset across systems and platforms 
● Ability to make technical decisions and trade-offs 
● Experience in mentoring and guiding engineers 
● Focus on automation, scalability, and efficiency 
● Strong communication and stakeholder management skills  Why Join Us? 
● A collaborative, output-driven environment that fosters innovation. 
● Opportunities to work on large-scale, high-impact projects.
● A culture that values technical excellence, automation, and efficiency. 
● Respect that is earned from peers and leadership based on contributions and impact.

Compensation: 
If you are the right fit, we believe in creating wealth for you with enviable 500 mn+ registered users, 25 mn+ merchants and depth of data in our ecosystem, we are in a unique position to democratize credit for deserving consumers & merchants – and we are committed to it. India’s largest digital lending story is brewing here. 

It’s your opportunity to be a part of the story!

We are hiring an AI Agentic Solutions Architect to drive enterprise adoption of AI-powered workflow
automation. This role sits at the intersection of business process transformation, AI systems, and
enterprise sales.
You will work directly with enterprise customers to understand their workflows, identify automation
opportunities, and design agentic solutions that deliver measurable outcomes such as cost reduction,
conversion uplift, and improved customer experience.

Key Responsibilities
Customer Journey and Workflow Design
 Map end-to-end customer journeys across sales, support, and operations.
 Identify high-impact automation opportunities.
 Design agent-driven workflows across systems and teams.
Solution Architecture
 Design agentic AI systems including orchestration, APIs, and integrations.
 Combine LLMs, rules, and enterprise systems into scalable architectures.
Business Value Articulation
 Translate solutions into measurable outcomes such as cost reduction and conversion uplift.
 Support deal teams with ROI narratives.
POC and Deployment
 Lead proof-of-concept (POC) engagements with clear success metrics.
 Ensure POCs convert to production deployments.
Stakeholder Engagement
 Engage both business and technical stakeholders.
 Effectively handle skepticism stemming from prior enterprise AI failures.
Reusable Playbooks
 Build repeatable solution frameworks across industries.
 Enable sales teams with structured use cases.
Superpowers & Skills That Will Help You Succeed
 5–8 years of experience in AI/ML, SaaS, or workflow automation.
 Proven track record of working successfully with enterprise customers.
 Strong foundational understanding of customer journeys and core business processes.
 Technical familiarity with APIs, system integrations, and complex enterprise software architectures.
 Exceptional communication skills, with the ability to bridge the gap and communicate effectively
with both technical engineers and business stakeholders.

Key Result Areas (KRAs)
 Deal Impact: Influence deal progression and maximize win rates.
 POC Conversion: Successfully convert pilots to full production deployments.
 Business Value Articulation: Deliver quantified outcomes, data-backed ROI, and clear business
metrics.
 Workflow Depth: Build strong, highly repeatable use cases across diverse industries.
 Customer Credibility: Establish deep trust and strategic advisory standing with enterprise
stakeholders.
Culture &  Compensation

Why Join Us?
We foster a merit-based culture that thrives on self-motivated & driven individuals who are set out
to build a successful career in India’s fastest-growing Fintech Organization. We offer an agile &
democratic setup that gives space to your creativity, provides the opportunity to work at a massive
scale, and encourages diverse perspectives at all times.

Compensation Wealth Creation
If you are the right fit, we believe in creating wealth for you. With an enviable 500 million+
registered users, 21 million+ merchants, and unparalleled depth of data in our ecosystem, we are in
a unique position to democratize credit for deserving consumers & merchants—and we are
committed to it. India’s largest digital lending story is brewing here. It’s your opportunity to be a
part of the story!

jobs.title: Product Design - Product Designer
jobs.description:
Title: Product Design
 
About Us: Paytm is India's leading mobile payments and financial services distribution company. Pioneer of the mobile QR payments revolution in India, Paytm builds technologies that help small businesses with payments and commerce. Paytm’s mission is to serve half a billion Indians and bring them to the mainstream economy with the help of technology. About the Role
We are looking for a Product Designer 3 who combines strong problem-solving ability with solid design craft. In this role, you will own product areas end-to-end, create high-quality designs, and collaborate closely with product, engineering, and research to ship impactful solutions. You will be expected to push for excellence, contribute to systems, and grow into a craft leader for more junior designers.

What You’ll Do
• Own Product Areas: Take end-to-end responsibility for medium-to-large product features, from concept to delivery.
• Solve Problems with Clarity: Break down user and business challenges into clear, elegant design solutions.
• Deliver with Craft: Create polished interaction and visual design that aligns with design systems and elevates user experience.
• Collaborate Deeply: Partner with product managers, engineers, and researchers to ensure design is central to decision-making.
• Contribute to Systems: Apply and extend existing design systems, ensuring consistency across product experiences.
• Articulate Decisions: Present and defend design decisions with clarity and confidence to peers and stakeholders.
• Mentor Juniors: Guide early-career designers through feedback and critique, contributing to their growth. What We’re Looking For
• 4–6 years of experience in product design with shipped work that demonstrates craft and problem solving.
• Strong portfolio showcasing interaction design, visual design, and product thinking.
• Ability to translate requirements and research insights into actionable design solutions.
• Working knowledge of design systems and scalable patterns.
• Strong collaboration skills with cross-functional teams.
• Proactive, detail-oriented, and committed to raising the quality bar. Why join us?
• A collaborative output driven program that brings cohesiveness across businesses through technology
• Improve the average revenue per use by increasing the cross-sell opportunities
• A solid 360 feedback from your peer teams on your support of their goals
• Respect, that is earned, not demanded from your peers and manager
 
Compensation:
If you are the right fit, we believe in creating wealth for you. With enviable 500 mn+ registered users, 21 mn+ merchants and depth of data in our ecosystem, we are in a unique position to democratize credit for deserving consumers & merchants – and we are committed to it. India’s largest digital lending story is brewing here. It’s your opportunity to be a part of the story!

About Us: 
Paytm is India's leading mobile payments and financial services distribution company. Pioneer of the mobile QR payments revolution in India, Paytm builds technologies that help small businesses with payments and commerce. Paytm’s mission is to serve half a billion Indians and bring them to the mainstream economy with the help of technology. About the Role
We are seeking a Staff / Sr. Staff Product Designer — a hands-on design leader who excels at craft, thrives on solving the hardest problems, and sets the benchmark for design quality. This role is for someone who can turn ambiguity into clarity, drive complex initiatives end-to-end, and inspire other designers by example. You will influence across teams, elevate craft standards, and deliver design work that becomes a reference point for the organization.

What You’ll Do
• Solve Complex, Ambiguous Problems: Lead design in critical product areas, breaking down complexity into elegant, scalable solutions.
• Set the Benchmark: Deliver exemplary design work that defines the standard of craft across the design org.
• Hands-on Craft Leadership: Stay deeply involved in execution, producing high-impact design work while inspiring peers through example.
• Drive Ownership: Take full accountability for outcomes — from problem framing to polished, system-ready solutions.
• Elevate Team Craft: Mentor and guide designers, raising the bar in problem solving, product thinking, and execution quality.
• Shape Systems & Frameworks: Extend and influence design systems, ensuring consistency and scalability across product surfaces.
• Influence at Scale: Clearly articulate design rationale to senior stakeholders, shaping decisions and aligning cross-functional teams.
• Self-Initiate: Identify opportunities proactively and lead design explorations without waiting for direction. What We’re Looking For
• Product design experience with a track record of solving complex, high-scale challenges.
• Portfolio that demonstrates mastery in craft and problem solving — interaction depth, visual polish, and systems thinking.
• Strong ability to translate ambiguity into clarity and deliver north-star experiences.
• Recognized as a go-to problem solver for complex design challenges.
• Experience mentoring mid-to-senior designers and driving org-wide uplift in craft.
• Strong product sense, balancing user needs, business impact, and technical feasibility.
• Self-driven, outcome-oriented, and uncompromising on craft quality. Why join us?
• A collaborative output driven program that brings cohesiveness across businesses through technology
• Improve the average revenue per use by increasing the cross-sell opportunities
• A solid 360 feedback from your peer teams on your support of their goals
• Respect, that is earned, not demanded from your peers and manager

jobs.title: Product Management - APM - Telco
jobs.description:
About Paytm:
Paytm is India's leading mobile payments and financial services distribution company. Pioneer of the mobile QR payments revolution in India, Paytm builds technologies that help small businesses with payments and commerce. Paytm’s mission is to serve half a billion Indians and bring them to the mainstream economy with the help of technology.

About the team:
Thriving on innovation, One97 delivers Customer Communication, Up-Selling, Mobile Content, Advertising based and Platform services to over 500 Million mobile consumers across the globe. Headquartered in New Delhi, and backed by marquee investors like Intel Capital, Elevation Capital, Silicon Valley Bank, SAP Ventures & Berkshire Hathaway, One97’s products and services are available on various models i.e. Capex, Opex & Revenue Share model as per the flexibility of Telco’s.

Our Key Offerings are divided into 5 broad categories as follows:
• Entertainment
• Digital Platforms
• CVM Solutions
• Enterprise Services
• Financial Platforms

One97 has the widest and largest deployment of telecom applications on cloud platforms in India and has a myriad of VAS services that have helped operators augment their revenue even in complex markets like India, SAARC, Middle East, Africa and many more.

Role Overview
We are seeking a motivated and experienced professional to join our Telco Services team. The role involves managing and enhancing core telco offerings such as Web Portals,IVR, USSD, SMS, Pre-call Services, Merchant IVR, and M2M IVR Portals, while also driving partner and marketplace integrations on Digital Super Apps/ Selfcare Apps/ Marketplace Apps. The candidate should bring prior hands-on experience in service delivery platforms, integration projects, and digital service ecosystems (OTT, gaming, content billing).

Key Responsibilities
1) Requirement Gathering & Analysis
-Engage with business teams and partners to capture and refine requirements for telco and VAS services.
-Translate business needs into detailed functional and technical specifications.
2) Service Delivery & Operations
-Manage end-to-end lifecycle of assigned telco services (IVR, USSD, SMS, Pre-call, Merchant IVR, M2M IVR).
-Monitor performance and proactively identify areas for optimization.
-Lead incident analysis, root cause identification, and closure of operational issues.
3) Partner & Vendor Integrations
-Work with external partners/vendors for onboarding and integration on Service Delivery Platforms (SDP).
-Manage Marketplace Vendor Integrations for digital services (OTT, games, content providers).
-Support Direct Carrier Billing (DCB) projects, ensuring seamless settlement, compliance, and reconciliation.
4) Testing & Quality Assurance
-Drive UAT and regression testing of new features, enhancements, and partner integrations.
-Ensure test cases and validation processes are well-documented and executed.
5) Documentation & Compliance
-Prepare and maintain operational runbooks, process flows, and integration guides.
-Support audits and compliance checks related to telco services and billing.
6) Cross-functional Collaboration
-Work closely with engineering, QA, support, and business stakeholders to ensure timely project delivery.
-Coordinate with partners for troubleshooting and service improvements.
7) Continuous Improvement
-Recommend process automation and monitoring enhancements.
-Stay updated with evolving telco protocols, VAS technologies, and digital monetization trends.

Key Skills & Competencies
-Strong understanding of Telco Service Delivery Platforms (SDP).
-Hands-on experience with Web Portals,Subscription Manager,IVR, USSD, SMS, and related VAS platforms.
-Knowledge of partner/vendor integrations and direct carrier billing (OTT, Games, Content services).
-Familiarity with telecom billing protocols (SMPP, SIP, Diameter, MAP, CAMEL, etc.).
-Good grasp of service monitoring tools and incident management processes.
-Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills with data-driven problem solving.
-Excellent documentation, stakeholder communication, and coordination skills.

Good to Have
-Exposure to cloud-based telco/VAS deployments.
-Experience with API-based integrations (REST, SOAP, XML, JSON).
-Understanding of revenue assurance and billing reconciliation processes.
-Prior experience in telecom operator environments or large-scale service platforms. Why Join Us?
● Learn and grow in a collaborative product environment
● Contribute to innovative products with real business impact
● Gain exposure to the complete product development lifecycle
● Work with experienced mentors and diverse teams

Compensation: 
If you are the right fit, we believe in creating wealth for you
With enviable 500 mn+ registered users, 17 mn+ merchants and depth of data in our ecosystem, we are in a unique position to democratize credit for deserving consumers & merchants – and we are committed to it.
India’s largest digital lending story is brewing here. It’s your opportunity to be a part of the story!

We are looking for a highly skilled Data Engineer to design, build, and optimize scalable data systems that power our products and insights. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to develop robust data infrastructure, ensure data quality, and enable data-driven decision-making across the organization.

Key Responsibilities:
● Design, develop, and maintain scalable data pipelines for ingestion, processing, and storage
● Build and manage ETL workflows using tools such as Apache Spark, Apache NiFi, or similar technologies
● Integrate data from multiple sources into centralized data warehouses or data lakes
● Collaborate with data scientists, analysts, and engineers to translate business needs into technical solutions
● Ensure data quality, integrity, and reliability through validation and monitoring processes
● Optimize data pipelines for performance, scalability, and efficiency
● Monitor, troubleshoot, and resolve production issues with minimal downtime
● Implement best practices in data governance, security, and compliances
● Contribute to continuous improvement, automation, and system reliability
● Document workflows, systems, and technical specification
● Stay updated with emerging trends and technologies in data engineering


What You’ll Do
● Build systems to collect and transform complex datasets for production use
● Develop and maintain backend services and data infrastructure
● Implement scalable data schemas and improve data management practices
● Provide insights into product performance and customer behavior
● Act as a subject matter expert in data infrastructure, privacy, and security
● Collaborate with stakeholders to understand and deliver on requirements
● Participate in on-call rotations to support live systems

Minimum Qualifications
● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience)
● 3+ years of experience in data engineering or backend engineering 
● Strong understanding of data structures and algorithms
● Proficiency in Java, Python, or Scala
● Strong SQL skills with the ability to write complex queries
● Experience with workflow orchestration tools such as Airflow
● Hands-on experience with big data technologies like Apache Spark, Kafka, or Flink
● Experience with databases such as Cassandra, MongoDB, Oracle, or PostgreSQL
● Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS or GCP)
● Experience with containerization tools like Docker and Kubernetes
● Experience building scalable microservices using REST, Spring Boot, or gRPC
● Strong problem-solving, communication, and collaboration skills

Preferred Qualifications

● Knowledge of data security and compliance standards

jobs.title: Senior Network Engineer
jobs.description:
About Us: 

Paytm is India's leading mobile payments and financial services distribution company. Pioneer of the mobile QR payments revolution in India, Paytm builds technologies that help small businesses with payments and commerce. Paytm’s mission is to serve half a billion Indians and bring them to the mainstream economy with the help of technology.

About Role: We are seeking an experienced L2 Network & Security Engineer to join our team. As an integral part of our network operations, you will play a crucial role in maintaining and securing our infrastructure. If you have a passion for networking, security, and troubleshooting, we’d love to hear from you!

Job Location: Noida Responsibilities:
Install and Support: Deploy and maintain LANs, WANs, and network segments. 
Support Coordination: Collaborate with equipment vendors for troubleshooting and configuration standardization.
Firewall Management: Handle firewall configurations to ensure security and optimal performance.
Switch Expertise: Maintain a strong understanding of LAN switching technologies, including VLANs, RSTP, ACLs, and Virtual Chassis.
Capacity Planning: Recommend network capacity planning strategies.
Proactive Maintenance: Plan and execute proactive maintenance for disaster recovery.
Network Monitoring: Monitor networks for security, reliability, and availability.

Key Skills Required:
He/She/They should have 3-6 Yrs. of overall IT experience. 
Firewalls: Proficient in configuring, managing, and troubleshooting FortiGate and Palo-Alto firewall. 
Network Switches: Skilled in handling Cisco, Juniper, and Huawei switches.
Wireless: Familiarity with Aruba, Cisco controllers and access points.
Cloud Expertise: Experience with AWS and Zscaler Private Access.
Network Protocols: Sound knowledge of various network protocols and ports.
Security Technologies: Familiarity with IPSec, SSL VPN, IDS, and IPS.
Additional Skills:
Routing and Switching: Prior experience in routing and switching.
Communication: Strong verbal and written communication skills. Why join us:

jobs.title: Technical Operations
jobs.description:
About Paytm Group: Paytm is India's leading mobile payments and financial services distribution company. Pioneer of the mobile QR payments revolution in India, Paytm builds technologies that help small businesses with payments and commerce. Paytm's mission is to serve half a billion Indians and bring them to the mainstream economy with the help of technology.

OVERALL ROLE: The Technical Manager will (lead a team to) manage the day-to-day M&E Operations and activities for the assigned  property/facility, and be the on-site key point of contact for key location stakeholders. The role will assume overall  responsibility for site budgets, accounting and finance, maintenance and operations, contract services, purchasing of  material, equipment & supplies, occupancy services and helpdesk.  

MAJOR RESPONSIBILITIES 
▪ Operations Management:
● Establish Engineering & Operational procedures and roll out the same for site staff  
● Establish contacts with local authorities on the facility related issues and maintain the relationship. Responsible  for all legal & authorities related compliances pertaining to facility & engineering systems  
● Plan and manage the budgets for Engineering & Operational contracts  
● Carry out Technical Audits for all installations at periodical intervals  
● Review the maintenance/service practices of M&E Contractors to deliver quality work practices in line with the  manufacturer recommendations  
● Plan & take responsibility for smooth operations of all Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing installations and Civil  works pertaining to the facility 
 ● Responsible for planning a critical spares list for all installations as per manufacturer's recommendations and  inventory  
● Responsible for development of all maintenance related schedules and shutdowns in consultation with Clients  / OEMs 
 ● Periodically inspect the logbooks, checklists and PPM schedules for a better management of Engineering  systems  
● Work towards the 'ZERO' down time and set up the practices to ensure the delivery of seamless service  
● Responsible for ensuring all statutory obligations such as Fire, Lift, Explosives and stability certificate etc.  
● Responsible for setting up the maintenance contracts to ensure the risk mitigation  
● Implement the Energy management programs to reduce the cost on utilities  
● Handle small renovation projects from initiation to completion. Basic knowledge of Projects management is  essential  
● Responsible for weekly & monthly reports on M&E, covering the maintenance contracts, spare parts  consumption, Incident reports, Improvement projects etc  ● Ensure energy management, saving opportunities, risk management & engineering systems audits.  
● Recommend continuous quality improvement practices and implement Industry Best Practice operations  
● Review existing operations regularly to reduce costs and improve operational standards  
● 24/7 emergency call support and site attendance is required  
● Develop and implement a facility management program including preventative maintenance and life-cycle requirements   
● Supervise maintenance and repair of facilities and equipment. Timely maintenance of Generator, UPS, Elevator,  Air conditioners and other critical equipment   
● Plan and monitor appropriate facility management staffing levels & ensure efficient utilization of facility  maintenance staff   
● Develop and implement innovation programs and processes that reduce utility costs, increase productivity and  savings and share learnings with within department   
● Continuous optimization of processes, tools and documentation  

▪ Stakeholder Management:
 ● Develop and sustain a high-quality well motivated team  
● Ensure that engineering staff is qualified and trained to perform the duties they are expected to carry out  
● Manage and coach team  
● Provide technical advice and guidance for site delivery team  
● Ensure high staff morale, trust and work ethics  
● Build and maintain an environment that supports teamwork, co-operation and performance excellence within  team  

▪ Contracts Management: 
 ● Plan and manage all contracts to ensure that they are professionally delivered at the right costs  
● Ensure expiry of contracts are well-monitored and re validations are initiated if needed  
● Ensure contracts are continually assessed to deliver best value  
● Calculate and compare costs for goods and services to maximize cost-effectiveness   
● Manage contractor and vendor relationships   

▪ Procurement & Vendor Management:
 ● Ensure vendors are well-managed, delivering services on time and within budget  
● Review the maintenance/service practices of M&E contractors to deliver quality work practices in line with the  manufacturer recommendations, established processes, tools and documentation  
● Plan and manage budgets for Engineering & Operational contracts  
● Ensure that vendor procurement processes comply with agreed procurement guidelines as well as One97 /  Paytm best practices 
 
▪ Finance Management  
● Verify payment and invoicing match contract pricing   
● Prepare and track facility budget   
● Monitor expenses and payments   
● Generate and present regular reports and reviews of facility-related budgets, finances, contracts, expenditures  and purchases for the location   
● Develop and implement cost reduction initiatives   
● Actively work to ensure that the site’s financial operations are meeting or exceeding targets and control  requirements including One97 / Paytm best practices  
● Ensure financial processes are followed at all times  

▪ Health & Safety Management  
● Ensure the provision of a safe working environment  
● Advise on and monitor energy efficiency   
● Oversee environmental health and safety practices & implement changes for safe work environment  
● Respond to facility and equipment alarms and system failures   
● Ensure compliance with statutory regulations on fire, health and safety standards  

CANDIDATE SPECIFICATION:  
KEY SELECTION CRITERIA 
Ideal Experience :
● Graduate / Postgraduate in Electrical Engineering  
● 10-12 years’ experience in managing Conventional / Multi-tenant Facility  
● Has background and experience working in service industry   
● Knowledge of local occupational health and safety requirements  
● Knowledge of critical facilities  
● Knowledge of vendor management for specialized services  
● Excellent understanding of technical aspects of property and its utilities (Data center, generators,  Air-conditioning, Chiller system, Fire Protection system, Mechanical & Electrical system, UPS, BMS system)  
● Strong budget management and financial analysis skills  

Other Personal Characteristics: 
● Strong communicator – Good presentation skills and possesses strong verbal & written communication skills  (English & Hindi),  also an active listener  
● Passion for quality – has an eye for detail to make sure the best delivery of services  
● Self-motivated; confident & energetic  
● Ability to effectively deal with stressful situations  
● Flexible – able to adapt to rapidly changing situations  
● Strongly goal-oriented – able to focus on meeting all performance targets  
● Is a team player – able to cooperate and work well with others to meet targets  ● Proven ability to initiate and follow through with improvement initiatives  
● Exhibits honesty & trustworthiness

jobs.title: Telco - Product Management - Manager
jobs.description:
About Us: 
Paytm is India's leading mobile payments and financial services distribution company. Pioneer of the mobile QR payments revolution in India, Paytm builds technologies that help small businesses with payments and commerce. Paytm’s mission is to serve half a billion Indians and bring them to the mainstream economy with the help of technology

About Telco Team:
Thriving on innovation, One97 delivers Customer Communication, Up-Selling, Mobile Content, Advertising based and Platform services to over 500 Million mobile consumers across the globe. One97’s products and services are available on various models i.e. Capex, Opex & Revenue Share model as per the flexibility of Telco’s.

Our Key Offerings are divided into 5 broad categories as follows:
• Entertainment
• Digital Platforms
• CVM Solutions
• Enterprise Services
• Financial Platforms
One97 has the widest and largest deployment of telecom applications on cloud platforms in India and has a myriad of VAS services that have helped operators augment their revenue even in complex markets like India, SAARC, Middle East, Africa and many more. Key Responsibilities:-
-Assist in gathering basic business requirements for Telco services.
-Support documentation of functional specifications and user stories.
-Learn and contribute to the product lifecycle of assigned services.
-Monitor performance and health of live Telco services.
-Assist in initial investigation of operational issues and incidents.
-Support creation and maintenance of operational documentation.
-Learn and utilize service monitoring tools and platforms.
-Participate in testing of new service features or deployments.
-Contribute to routine daily operations tasks.
-Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Engineering, QA, Support).
-Develop understanding of Telco protocols and service delivery.
-Enhance skills in data analysis, reporting, and troubleshooting.

Qualification Required:-
Fresher B.E. Electronics & Telecommunications graduate. 
6–12+ years of experience in telecom, fintech, or digital payments  Strong understanding of telco ecosystem (recharges, plans, APIs, billing systems)  
Proven experience in partnerships, category growth, or product management.  Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.  
Excellent stakeholder management and negotiation skills.  MBA from a Tier-1/2 institute preferred. Why join us?
·         A collaborative output driven program that brings cohesiveness across businesses through technology
·         Improve the average revenue per use by increasing the cross-sell opportunities
·         A solid 360 feedback from your peer teams on your support of their goals
·         Respect, that is earned, not demanded from your peers and manager
 
Compensation: If you are the right fit, we believe in creating wealth for you With enviable 500 mn+ registered users, 21 mn+ merchants and depth of data in our ecosystem, we are in a unique position to democratize credit for deserving consumers & merchants – and we are committed to it. India’s largest digital lending story is brewing here. It’s your opportunity.

jobs.title: AI/ML Engineer (LLMs, RAG Agent Systems)
jobs.description: As an AI/ML Engineer, you’ll be part of a small, fast-moving team focused on developing LLM-powered agentic systems that drive our next generation of AI products. You’ll work on designing, implementing, and optimizing pipelines involving retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), multi-agent coordination, and tool-using AI systems. Responsibilities Design and implement components for LLM-based systems (retrievers, planners, memory, evaluators). Build and maintain RAG pipelines using vector databases and embedding models. Experiment with reasoning frameworks like ReAct, Tree of Thought, and Reflexion. Collaborate with backend and infra teams to deploy and optimize agentic applications. Research and experiment with open-source LLM frameworks to identify best-fit architectures. Contribute to internal tools for evaluation, benchmarking, and scaling AI agents. Required Skills Strong foundation in ML/DL theory and implementation (PyTorch preferred). Understanding of transformer architectures, embeddings, and LLM mechanics. Practical exposure to prompt engineering, tool calling, and structured output design. Experience in Python, Git/GitHub, and data processing pipelines. Familiarity with RAG systems, vector databases, and API-based model inference. Ability to write clean, modular, and reproducible code. Preferred Skills Experience with LangChain, LangGraph, Autogen, or CrewAI. Hands-on with Hugging Face ecosystem (transformers, datasets, etc.). Working knowledge of Redis, PostgreSQL, or MongoDB. Experience with Docker and deployment workflows. Familiarity with OpenAI, Anthropic, vLLM, or Ollama inference APIs. Exposure to MLOps concepts like CI/CD, model versioning, or cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure). What We Value Deep understanding of core principles over surface-level familiarity with tools. Ability to think like a researcher and execute like an engineer. Collaborative mindset, building together, learning together.
